SyncRoom.title: Sync Room
SyncRoom.description: A cloud sync room that synchronizes recipe catalogs, meal plans, and grocery checklists across devices without a login using a unique room code.

roomCode.description: The unique six-character uppercase sync room code.

menus.description: The custom recipes catalog currently in the sync room.

mealPlans.description: The list of weekly meal plans.

groceryList.description: The active aggregated grocery checklist items.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the room state was last updated.

sync_rooms/{roomCode}.description: Main collection for real-time data sync rooms indexed by roomCode.
